debug_info.goal:
case some.none
𝕜 : Type u_2
α : Type u_4

inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
p : NNReal
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) none r
⊢ ‖f * g‖_[r] ≤ ‖f‖_[some p] * ‖g‖_[none]

failed_attempts:
obtain rfl : some p = r := by simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv

simpa [hpqr.inv_add] using dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpInfNorm f g p

rw [hpqr.r_eq]; exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top f g p

    exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top f g r

have : r = p := by simpa [hpqr.inv_add_inv] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

    exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top p f g
simpa [hpqr.inv_add_inv] using dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top f g p

obtain rfl : r = p := by simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv

simp [hpqr.r_eq, dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dL∞Norm]

obtain rfl := hpqr.r_eq_p
    exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top _ _ _
simpa [hpqr.eq_r] using dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top f g p
simpa [hpqr.triple_inv_none_q hr₀] using dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top f g
simp [hpqr.r_eq_p_of_q_eq_top rfl, dLpNorm_mul_LInf_le hr₀]

have : some p = r := by simpa [hpqr.inv_add_inv]
    subst this

simpa [← hpqr.inv_add_inv] using dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm_top hr₀ f g

have : r = p := by simpa [ENNReal.HolderTriple] using hpqr

simpa [ENNReal.inv_inj.1 (by simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv)] using

obtain rfl : r = some p := by simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv
    simpa [mul_comm] using dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_top_mul_dLpNorm g f hr₀
rw [hpqr.eq_r]; simp; exact dLpNorm_mul_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLinftyNorm f g
